languages.text: {n}Брови манипулуса взлетают вверх.{/n} "Поразительно! Ваша стойкость весьма впечатляющая. Но я бы все равно посоветовал пройти осмотр после завершения купания".
{n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."
languages.original_text: {n}Брови манипулуса взлетают вверх.{/n} "Поразительно! Ваша стойкость весьма впечатляющая. Но я бы все равно посоветовал пройти осмотр после завершения купания".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."
{n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."
{n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

languages.text: {n}El manipulus levanta ambas cejas muy sorprendido.{/n} «¡Asombroso! Su resistencia es impresionante. Aun así, le recomiendo que se someta a un examen clínico exhaustivo cuando termine sus abluciones».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus levanta ambas cejas muy sorprendido.{/n} «¡Asombroso! Su resistencia es impresionante. Aun así, le recomiendo que se someta a un examen clínico exhaustivo cuando termine sus abluciones».

languages.text: {n}操纵者的眉毛猛地扬了起来。{/n}“太惊人了！您的恢复能力令人惊叹。但我还是建议您，沐浴完毕后做一次健康检查。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者的眉毛猛地扬了起来。{/n}“太惊人了！您的恢复能力令人惊叹。但我还是建议您，沐浴完毕后做一次健康检查。”

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Incroyable ! Votre résilience est exceptionnelle. Je vous recommande toutefois de passer un examen de santé lorsque vous aurez terminé vos ablutions. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Incroyable ! Votre résilience est exceptionnelle. Je vous recommande toutefois de passer un examen de santé lorsque vous aurez terminé vos ablutions. »

languages.text: {n}Manipülus'un kaşları havaya kalkıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı! Dayanıklılığınız gerçekten etkileyici. Yine de taharet ayininiz bittikten sonra sağlık kontrolünden geçmenizi tavsiye ederim."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus'un kaşları havaya kalkıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı! Dayanıklılığınız gerçekten etkileyici. Yine de taharet ayininiz bittikten sonra sağlık kontrolünden geçmenizi tavsiye ederim."

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスの眉がぐいと吊り上がった。{/n}「驚嘆すべきことです！ あなたの耐性は実に見事です。とはいえ、湯浴みを終えられた後には、やはり健康診断をお勧めいたします」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスの眉がぐいと吊り上がった。{/n}「驚嘆すべきことです！ あなたの耐性は実に見事です。とはいえ、湯浴みを終えられた後には、やはり健康診断をお勧めいたします」

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus reißt die Augen auf.{/n} "Erstaunlich! Eure Resilienz ist wirklich beeindruckend. Dennoch würde ich Euch nach Eurer Waschung eine Gesundheitsprüfung empfehlen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's eyebrows shoot upward.{/n} "Astounding! Your resilience is most impressive. But I would still recommend a health review after you finish your ablutions."
